prestazioni: Engine: 6.0L twin-turbocharged W12 (engine code: **LJ7S**) with a **Garrett GTX5533R** turbo upgrade (1.25 A/R turbine housing, billet compressor wheel) paired with a **Precision Turbo & Engine 6266** ball-bearing center cartridge for reduced spool time and 850+ HP capability. Supporting mods include **Mahle Motorsport forged pistons (9.5:1 CR)**, **Carrillo H-beam connecting rods**, and a **Bespoke Performance W12-specific dry-sump oil system** to eliminate oil starvation under lateral G-forces.

Fuel System: **Bosch Motorsport 2,200cc/min port injectors** (PN: 0 280 158 129) combined with a **Syvecs S12 ECU** (CAN-bus integrated with Bentley’s factory torque vectoring) and a **Radium Engineering dual-pump fuel surge tank** (3.5L capacity) to prevent fuel starvation during sustained 1.5G cornering. Methanol injection via **AEM 340LPH pump and dual-nozzle kit** (50/50 water-methanol mix) for charge cooling and detonation suppression.

Drivetrain & Chassis: **Quaife ATB helical LSD** (front and rear) with **Bentley OEM differential cooler** (PN: 3W1 959 433) to prevent fluid degradation under track use. **Ohlins TTX46 coilovers** (3-way adjustable, 24-position rebound, 22-position compression) with **Eibach ERS springs (14kg/mm front, 16kg/mm rear)** for sub-200mm ride height. **AP Racing 6-piston front (400mm discs) and 4-piston rear (380mm discs) big brake kit** with **Ferodo DS2500 pads** and **Goodridge G-Stop braided stainless steel lines** for fade-resistant stopping power.
estetica: Aero: **Vorsteiner V-FF102 widebody kit** (carbon fiber, 50mm front/70mm rear fender flares) with **custom 3D-printed ABS underbody diffusers** (tested in Bentley’s own wind tunnel for -22% lift at 180mph). **Rocket Bunny V3 rear wing** (carbon fiber, 1,800mm span, adjustable angle of attack via **Aeromotions hydraulic actuators**) for +150kg downforce at 150mph. **Seibon carbon fiber hood** with **functional NACA ducts** (ducted to the **Garrett intercoolers**).

Exterior Trim: **Vossen HF-5 22x10.5 ET25 (front) and 22x12.5 ET35 (rear) forged wheels** in **matt bronze finish**, wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (285/30 R22 front, 325/25 R22 rear)**. **Litchfield carbon fiber side skirts** with **integrated LED turn signals** (Bentley OEM-spec, DOT-approved). **PPF (Paint Protection Film) by XPEL Stealth** applied to high-impact zones (front bumper, rocker panels, mirrors) with **ceramic coating (Gtechniq Crystal Serum Ultra)** for hydrophobic properties.

Interior: **Recaro Pole Position carbon fiber bucket seats** (FIA 8862-2009 certified) with **Schroth 6-point harnesses** and **custom Bentley-stitched Alcantara headliner**. **Momo Prototipo steering wheel** (350mm diameter, suede-wrapped, with **AiM MXS 1.2 data logger** integrated into the center hub). **Roll cage by Safety Devices** (T45 steel, bolt-in, with **custom door bar gussets** to clear Bentley’s suicide doors). **Alcantara-wrapped dashboard and door cards** with **exposed carbon fiber weave (3K twill)** on the center console and shift knob.
